ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the brand */,
  "brand_website" TEXT /* URL of the brand's official website */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the brand is headquartered */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "product_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand the product line belongs to */,
  "line_description" TEXT /* Description of the product line */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the product line was launched */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Description of the target audience */,
  "marketing_description" TEXT /* Detailed marketing description of the product line */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the product line is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_lines_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category */,
  "is_parent_category" INTEGER /* Indicates whether this is a parent category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product line the product belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category the product belongs to */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the product */,
  "msrp" TEXT /* Manufacturer Suggested Retail Price (MSRP) of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the main image of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material(s) the product is made of */,
  "is_discontinued" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the product is discontinued */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the system */,
  "date_discontinued" TEXT /* Date the product was discontinued (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the size belongs to */,
  "size_eu" INTEGER /* European size of the product */,
  "chest_b_cup" INTEGER /* Chest measurement for B-cup size in cm */,
  "chest_c_cup" INTEGER /* Chest measurement for C-cup size in cm */,
  "chest_d_cup" INTEGER /* Chest measurement for D-cup size in cm */,
  "underbust" TEXT /* Underbust measurement range in cm */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement range in cm */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement range in cm */,
  "size_us" TEXT /* US size equivalent */,
  "size_uk" TEXT /* UK size equivalent */,
  "size_jp" TEXT /* Japanese size equivalent */,
  "size_chart_url" TEXT /* URL to a detailed size chart */,
  "fit_tips" TEXT /* Tips for fitting this size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size the inventory belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product size in stock */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the inventory is stored */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity that triggers a reorder */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date of the last restock */,
  "next_restock_date" TEXT /* Planned date for the next restock */,
  "lead_time_days" INTEGER /* Lead time in days for restocking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the inventory location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the inventory location */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the inventory location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the location */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the location manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "preferred_size" TEXT /* Customer's preferred size */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "total_spent" TEXT /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fit_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fit recommendation */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the recommendation belongs to */,
  "chest_b_cup" INTEGER /* Chest measurement for B-cup size in cm */,
  "chest_c_cup" INTEGER /* Chest measurement for C-cup size in cm */,
  "chest_d_cup" INTEGER /* Chest measurement for D-cup size in cm */,
  "underbust" TEXT /* Underbust measurement range in cm */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement range in cm */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement range in cm */,
  "recommendation_text" TEXT /* Text of the fit recommendation */,
  "recommendation_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image illustrating the fit recommendation */,
  "video_tutorial_url" TEXT /* URL to a video tutorial for the fit recommendation */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the recommendation is featured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "order_number" TEXT /* Unique order number for the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the sale */,
  "is_returned" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the sale has been returned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., product manager, inventory specialist, customer support) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or client used */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
